mapper.select: select * from ${tableName} order by id asc
mapper.update: update internal_products set master_product_id=#{masterProductId}, updated_at=current_timestamp where id=#{id}
mapper.select: select * from customer_orders where order_no=#{orderNo}
select * from customer_orders where order_no=#{orderNo} and customer_username=#{customerUsername}
select * from supplier_submissions where id=#{id}
select * from unmatched_customer_items where id=#{id}
select * from customer_order_items where id=#{id}
select * from customer_products where id=#{id} and customer_username=#{customerUsername}
select * from customer_products where id=#{id}
select * from internal_products where id=#{id}
select * from internal_products where code=#{code} order by id limit 1
select * from supplier_submissions where ifnull(spec_model, '')=#{specModel} and supplier_username=#{supplierUsername} order by id limit 1
select * from supplier_submissions where supplier_username=#{supplierUsername} and code=#{code} order by id limit 1
select * from master_products where code=#{code} order by id limit 1
select * from master_products where code=#{code} and supplier_username is not null and supplier_username!=''
select * from supplier_submissions where code=#{code} and supplier_username is not null and supplier_username!='' and status='APPROVED'
select * from supplier_submissions where code=#{code} and supplier_username is not null and supplier_username!='' order by id
select * from customer_order_items where order_no=#{orderNo} and code is not null and code!='' and (status is null or status not in ('CANCELLED','COMPLETED','QUOTE_COMPLETED'))
select * from customer_order_items order by updated_at desc, id asc
select * from customer_order_items where order_no=#{orderNo} order by id

select s.*, s.status link_status, case when exists ( select 1 from supplier_quotes q where q.supplier_username=s.supplier_username and q.code=s.code and q.status='WAIT_SUPPLIER_PRICE' ) then 'NEED_QUOTE' else 'QUOTED' end quote_status, from supplier_submissions s order by case when exists ( select 1 from supplier_quotes q where q.supplier_username=s.supplier_username and q.code=s.code and q.status='WAIT_SUPPLIER_PRICE' ) then 0 else 1 end, s.updated_at asc, s.id asc

select s.*, s.status link_status, case when exists ( select 1 from supplier_quotes q where q.supplier_username=s.supplier_username and q.code=s.code and q.status='WAIT_SUPPLIER_PRICE' ) then 'NEED_QUOTE' else 'QUOTED' end quote_status, from supplier_submissions s where s.supplier_username=#{supplierUsername} order by case when exists ( select 1 from supplier_quotes q where q.supplier_username=s.supplier_username and q.code=s.code and q.status='WAIT_SUPPLIER_PRICE' ) then 0 else 1 end, s.updated_at asc, s.id asc
select * from supplier_submissions where supplier_username=#{supplierUsername} order by id asc
select * from supplier_quotes where supplier_username=#{supplierUsername} order by id desc

select q.id, q.pricing_group, q.supplier_username, coalesce(q.code, i.code) code, coalesce(s.new_code, i.new_code) new_code, coalesce(s.series, i.series) series, coalesce(s.brand, i.brand) brand, coalesce(s.color, i.color) color, coalesce(s.category, i.category) category, coalesce(s.craft_material, i.craft_material) craft_material, coalesce(q.spec_model, s.spec_model, i.spec_model) spec_model, coalesce(s.common_model, i.common_model) common_model, coalesce(s.size_value, i.size_value) size_value, coalesce(s.resolution, i.resolution) resolution, coalesce(s.model_remark, i.model_remark) model_remark, q.purchase_price, q.price_valid_until, q.status, q.pricing_status, q.created_at, q.updated_at from supplier_quotes q left join supplier_submissions s on s.supplier_username=q.supplier_username and s.code=q.code left join customer_order_items i on q.customer_item_id=i.id order by q.id desc

select q.id, q.pricing_group, q.supplier_username, coalesce(q.code, i.code) code, coalesce(s.new_code, i.new_code) new_code, coalesce(s.series, i.series) series, coalesce(s.brand, i.brand) brand, coalesce(s.color, i.color) color, coalesce(s.category, i.category) category, coalesce(s.craft_material, i.craft_material) craft_material, coalesce(q.spec_model, s.spec_model, i.spec_model) spec_model, coalesce(s.common_model, i.common_model) common_model, coalesce(s.size_value, i.size_value) size_value, coalesce(s.resolution, i.resolution) resolution, coalesce(s.model_remark, i.model_remark) model_remark, q.purchase_price, q.price_valid_until, q.status, q.pricing_status, q.created_at, q.updated_at from supplier_quotes q left join supplier_submissions s on s.supplier_username=q.supplier_username and s.code=q.code left join customer_order_items i on q.customer_item_id=i.id where q.supplier_username=#{supplierUsername} order by q.id desc

select q.id, q.customer_item_id, q.supplier_username, coalesce(q.code, i.code) code, q.pricing_group, coalesce(s.new_code, i.new_code) new_code, coalesce(s.series, i.series) series, coalesce(s.brand, i.brand) brand, coalesce(s.color, i.color) color, coalesce(s.category, i.category) category, coalesce(s.craft_material, i.craft_material) craft_material, coalesce(q.spec_model, s.spec_model, i.spec_model) spec_model, coalesce(s.common_model, i.common_model) common_model, coalesce(s.size_value, i.size_value) size_value, coalesce(s.resolution, i.resolution) resolution, coalesce(s.model_remark, i.model_remark) model_remark, q.purchase_price, q.sale_price, q.price_valid_until, q.status, q.pricing_status, q.created_at, q.updated_at from supplier_quotes q left join supplier_submissions s on s.supplier_username=q.supplier_username and s.code=q.code left join customer_order_items i on q.customer_item_id=i.id where q.supplier_username=#{supplierUsername} and q.pricing_group=#{orderNo} order by q.id

select q.id, q.customer_item_id, q.supplier_username, coalesce(q.code, i.code) code, q.pricing_group, coalesce(s.new_code, i.new_code) new_code, coalesce(s.series, i.series) series, coalesce(s.brand, i.brand) brand, coalesce(s.color, i.color) color, coalesce(s.category, i.category) category, coalesce(s.craft_material, i.craft_material) craft_material, coalesce(q.spec_model, s.spec_model, i.spec_model) spec_model, coalesce(s.common_model, i.common_model) common_model, coalesce(s.size_value, i.size_value) size_value, coalesce(s.resolution, i.resolution) resolution, coalesce(s.model_remark, i.model_remark) model_remark, q.purchase_price, q.sale_price, q.price_valid_until, q.status, q.pricing_status, q.created_at, q.updated_at from supplier_quotes q left join supplier_submissions s on s.supplier_username=q.supplier_username and s.code=q.code left join customer_order_items i on q.customer_item_id=i.id where q.supplier_username=#{supplierUsername} and q.pricing_group=#{orderNo} order by q.id

select q.id, q.customer_item_id, q.supplier_username, coalesce(q.code, i.code) code, q.pricing_group, coalesce(s.new_code, i.new_code) new_code, coalesce(s.series, i.series) series, coalesce(s.brand, i.brand) brand, coalesce(s.color, i.color) color, coalesce(s.category, i.category) category, coalesce(s.craft_material, i.craft_material) craft_material, coalesce(q.spec_model, s.spec_model, i.spec_model) spec_model, coalesce(s.common_model, i.common_model) common_model, coalesce(s.size_value, i.size_value) size_value, coalesce(s.resolution, i.resolution) resolution, coalesce(s.model_remark, i.model_remark) model_remark, q.purchase_price, q.sale_price, q.price_valid_until, q.status, q.pricing_status, q.created_at, q.updated_at from supplier_quotes q left join supplier_submissions s on s.supplier_username=q.supplier_username and s.code=q.code left join customer_order_items i on q.customer_item_id=i.id where q.status='SUPPLIER_PRICED' order by q.id desc
select * from customer_order_items where customer_username=#{customerUsername} order by updated_at desc, id asc
select * from internal_products order by id asc
select distinct order_no from customer_order_items where code=#{code} and order_no is not null and order_no!='' and (status is null or status not in ('CANCELLED','COMPLETED','QUOTE_COMPLETED'))
mapper.update: update customer_orders set status='CANCELLED', updated_at=current_timestamp where order_no=#{orderNo}
update customer_order_items set status='CANCELLED', updated_at=current_timestamp where order_no=#{orderNo}
update customer_order_items set status='CANCELLED', updated_at=current_timestamp where id=#{id}
update customer_order_items set status='CANCELLED', updated_at=current_timestamp where id=#{id} and customer_username=#{customerUsername}

update customer_order_items set purchase_price=#{purchasePrice}, sale_price=#{salePrice}, status=case when #{purchasePrice} is not null and #{salePrice} is not null then 'QUOTE_COMPLETED' else status end, updated_at=current_timestamp where id=#{id}
update customer_orders set status='QUOTE_GENERATED', updated_at=current_timestamp where order_no=#{orderNo}
update customer_order_items set status='QUOTE_GENERATED', updated_at=current_timestamp where id=#{id}

update customer_order_items set purchase_price=#{purchasePrice}, sale_price=#{salePrice}, status='QUOTE_COMPLETED', updated_at=current_timestamp where pricing_group=#{pricingGroup} and code=#{code} and (status is null or status not in ('CANCELLED','COMPLETED','QUOTE_COMPLETED'))

update customer_order_items set purchase_price=#{purchasePrice}, sale_price=#{salePrice}, status='QUOTE_COMPLETED', updated_at=current_timestamp where code=#{code} and (status is null or status not in ('CANCELLED','COMPLETED','QUOTE_COMPLETED'))

update customer_products set series=#{series}, brand=#{brand}, color=#{color}, category=#{category}, craft_material=#{craftMaterial}, spec_model=#{specModel}, common_model=#{commonModel}, size_value=#{sizeValue}, resolution=#{resolution}, model_remark=#{modelRemark}, sale_price=#{salePrice}, master_product_id=#{masterProductId}, updated_at=current_timestamp where id=#{id} and customer_username=#{customerUsername}

update customer_order_items set code=#{code}, new_code=#{newCode}, master_product_id=#{masterProductId}, matched=true, status='SUBMITTED_ORDER', updated_at=current_timestamp where customer_username=#{customerUsername} and ifnull(spec_model, '')=ifnull(#{specModel}, '') and ifnull(common_model, '')=ifnull(#{commonModel}, '') and (matched=false or ifnull(code, '')='')

update supplier_quotes set purchase_price=#{purchasePrice}, price_valid_until=#{priceValidUntil}, status='SUPPLIER_PRICED', updated_at=current_timestamp where id=#{id} and supplier_username=#{supplierUsername}

update supplier_quotes set purchase_price=#{purchasePrice}, price_valid_until=#{priceValidUntil}, status='SUPPLIER_PRICED', updated_at=current_timestamp where supplier_username=#{supplierUsername} and code=#{code} and status='WAIT_SUPPLIER_PRICE'
update supplier_submissions set new_code=#{newCode}, master_product_id=#{masterProductId}, status='APPROVED', updated_at=current_timestamp where id=#{id}
mapper.select: select * from supplier_quotes where id=#{id}
mapper.update: update internal_products set purchase_price=#{purchasePrice}, sale_price=#{salePrice}, price_valid_until=#{priceValidUntil}, updated_at=current_timestamp where code=#{code}

update internal_products set purchase_price=#{purchasePrice}, price_valid_until=#{priceValidUntil}, updated_at=current_timestamp where code=#{code} and #{priceValidUntil} is not null and (purchase_price is null or #{purchasePrice} < purchase_price)

update master_products set series=#{series}, brand=#{brand}, code=#{code}, new_code=#{newCode}, color=#{color}, category=#{category}, craft_material=#{craftMaterial}, spec_model=#{specModel}, common_model=#{commonModel}, size_value=#{sizeValue}, resolution=#{resolution}, model_remark=#{modelRemark}, sale_price=#{salePrice}, purchase_price=#{purchasePrice}, price_valid_until=#{priceValidUntil}, customer_username=#{customerUsername}, updated_at=current_timestamp where id=#{masterProductId}

update master_products set series=#{series}, brand=#{brand}, new_code=#{newCode}, color=#{color}, category=#{category}, craft_material=#{craftMaterial}, common_model=#{commonModel}, size_value=#{sizeValue}, resolution=#{resolution}, model_remark=#{modelRemark}, purchase_price=#{purchasePrice}, updated_at=current_timestamp where source_type='SUPPLIER' and code=#{code} and spec_model=#{specModel} and supplier_username=#{supplierUsername}

update master_products set series=#{series}, brand=#{brand}, new_code=#{newCode}, color=#{color}, category=#{category}, craft_material=#{craftMaterial}, common_model=#{commonModel}, size_value=#{sizeValue}, resolution=#{resolution}, model_remark=#{modelRemark}, sale_price=#{salePrice}, updated_at=current_timestamp where source_type='CUSTOMER_MATCH' and code=#{code} and spec_model=#{specModel} and customer_username=#{customerUsername} and (order_no=#{orderNo} or #{orderNo} is null)

update master_products set series=#{series}, brand=#{brand}, code=#{code}, new_code=#{newCode}, color=#{color}, category=#{category}, craft_material=#{craftMaterial}, spec_model=#{specModel}, common_model=#{commonModel}, size_value=#{sizeValue}, resolution=#{resolution}, model_remark=#{modelRemark}, sale_price=#{salePrice}, purchase_price=#{purchasePrice}, price_valid_until=#{priceValidUntil}, updated_at=current_timestamp where id=#{masterProductId}
